query: id=17661 (ClinVar Variation ID for BRCA1 c.181T>G, p.Cys61Gly)
description: BRCA1 p.Cys61Gly — the canonical RING-domain missense reviewed by expert panel as Pathogenic. Same variant as ensembl_vep_brca1_c181tg.json (different API, complementary view).
